name: Nintendo Entertainment System
description: Nintendo's 8-bit home console platform that revived the console market and defined modern console game design.

eras.title: Black Box / Arcade Roots Era
eras.description: Early arcade-like releases, simple score-driven games, and Nintendo's foundational home-console lineup.

eras.title: Console Identity Era
eras.description: Deeper console-native games, major third-party franchises, and the rise of the NES as a long-form game platform.

eras.title: Late Mastery Era
eras.description: Late-generation technical refinement, ambitious sequels, and polished games released alongside the 16-bit transition.
